LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT RELIANT TRAVEL'S MOTION TO DISMISS ACTION PURSUANT TO CCP 399 IS DENIED. CCP SECTION 399 PROVIDES THAT IF PLAINTIFF FAILS TO PAY THE FEES TO TRANSFER WITHIN 5 DAYS OF THE ENTRY OF THE ORDER, ANY ONE CAN PAY THE COSTS TO EXPEDITE THE TRANSFER. IF NOBODY PAYS WITHIN 30 DAYS OF SERVICE OF THE ORDER, THE COURT MAY DISMISS. HERE, THE DEFENDANT PAID THE FEES WITHIN 30 DAYS OF THE ORDER. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART, REPORTER: SUSAN CROZIER, CSR # 4761

MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. GREGORY HAYNES, TEL. NO. 546-0777 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCE ON THE MATTER.

RULING - ATTY. HAYNES INFORMED COURT THAT CONSEL FOR DEFENDANT WOULD COME LATE, BUT ON THE THIRD CALL OF THE CASE AT 10:15 A.M., THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS - DEFENDANT RELIANT TRAVEL'S Motion To Dismiss Action Pursuant To C C P 399, MOTION IS DENIED. C C P SECTION 399 PROVIDES THAT IF PLAINTIFF FAILS TO PAY THE FEES TO TRANSFER WITHIN 5 DAYS OF THE ENTRY OF THE ORDER, ANY ONE CAN PAY THE COSTS TO EXPEDITE THE TRANSFER. IF NOBODY PAYS WITHIN 30 DAYS OF SERVICE OF THE ORDER, THE COURT MAY DISMISS. HERE, THE DEFENDANT PAID THE FEES WITHIN 30 DAYS OF THE ORDER. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. Judge: John K. Stewart, Reporter: Susan Crozier, CSR # 4761 =301/JKS/LB
